prompt: A stylized ANIMATED-FILM city landscape of Budapest — NOT photorealistic. Painterly semi-3D animation look like a high-end animated movie matte painting / Pixar-Disney background art: soft volumetric light, gentle hand-painted brush texture, clean charming shapes, smooth gradients, atmospheric depth. Scene: the Danube river with the grand Hungarian Parliament Building, the Chain Bridge and Buda Castle on the hill at warm golden hour. BRAND CUE (logo-free): an elegant luxury fashion boutique on the riverside promenade with a rich chocolate-brown facade covered in a tan-and-gold abstract floral quatrefoil monogram pattern (Louis-Vuitton-evocative, NO actual letters or logos), plus a few stacked vintage steamer travel trunks in tan and brown by the entrance. Color palette: warm cantaloupe-melon orange and soft honeydew green accents blended with rich Louis-Vuitton tan, chocolate brown and gold tones tying it together. Wide cinematic 16:9 composition. Absolutely NO text, NO words, NO written logos, NO badges, NO frames or borders.
